title: Choose a Healthy Animal
description: Select an active animal with clear eyes, good appetite, and no visible illness.

title: Verify Proper Age
description: Ensure the animal meets the minimum age requirement for valid Qurbani.

title: Check Physical Condition
description: Avoid animals that are blind, injured, or missing essential body parts.

title: Compare Price and Weight
description: Make sure the price is fair according to the animal’s size and health.

title: Buy from Trusted Sellers
description: Choose verified or reputable sellers to avoid fraud and unhealthy animals.

title: Avoid Last-Minute Buying
description: Early purchase gives better selection, fair prices, and less stress.

title: Ensure Proper Feeding
description: Keep the animal well-fed and hydrated before Qurbani day.

title: Maintain Humane Treatment
description: Keep the animal calm and avoid any unnecessary stress or harsh handling.

title: Follow Proper Slaughter Method
description: Ensure the process is clean, quick, and follows Islamic guidelines.

title: Plan Meat Distribution
description: Divide meat properly among family, relatives, and those in need.
